name: The Nebulus || OU: Delta Federation
description:
Orignial universe || Delta Federation || Sci Fi Adventure!

Welcome aboard the Nebulus! You can be anyone with any job on this small exploratory vessel made up of four misfits.

Introducing the crew!

CAPTAIN SYRAX

Syrax Ortiaz is a Cervaxtan, an 8 foot tall alien from Cervax. A good, friendly Captain with a heart of gold...and two...you know what.

ABBI ROLLAS:

Abbi is a 23 year old human pilot with a sassy, cocky attitude from Kaon City, Breeva. Relegated to the Nebulus after butting heads with her old Captain. Daughter of Braxton.

BRAXTON ROLLAS:

Braxton is a 48 year old man and the engineer of the Nebulus. Born poor on Breeva, he worked hard to get ahead. But after the tragic loss of his wife and son, he is closed off. Father of Abbi.

JIX:

Jix is a 30 year old female Farlian and a doctor on the Nebulus. Born on Ardo, a war torn planet, she saved up to move to Breeva and get her medical licence. She's worked on various ships, but when she tried to report her old superior, she was relegated to the Nebulus.

THE DELTA FEDERATION:

Founded over 500 years ago, the Delta Federation wishes to unite all the planets in the Delta quadrant to promote multiculutalism and trade between planets. In partnership with Delta Space, they exolore and engage in Diplomatic misssions to further their cause.

Hey, do you wanna know more about this universe? You can check out my WIP masterdoc here!

TAGS: sci-fi, space, RPG, original universe, aliens, exploration, small exploratory ship, misfits, found family, adventure
creator: Switchnbate
